## Relevate

Relevate is a Belgian AI implementation partner. We build working prototypes on real business processes in weeks, not months, so teams can test results before scaling.

### Services
- AI diagnostic (1-2 weeks)
- AI prototype (4-6 weeks)
- AI implementation (optional, with change management)

### Primary Page
- https://www.relevate.be/

### Contact
- contact@relevate.be
- Brussels, Belgium
